description: nods reference catalog for semantic ontology alignment. Generated from CMF source on 2026-04-04. Source: nods.cmf, codelists.

actions.reuse: The source concept maps directly to an existing type. Use the target type as-is.
actions.extend: The source concept requires a new extension type that inherits from a base type via rdfs:subClassOf.
actions.augment: The source concept contributes properties to an existing type via an augmentation type, without subclassing.

typePatterns.association: Relationship types with role properties. Match when the source concept represents a relationship between entities.
typePatterns.object: Container types with properties. The primary matching targets for domain concepts.

properties.name: lang
properties.definition:
lang (as an attribute name)
      
       denotes an attribute whose value
       is a language code for the natural language of the content of
       any element; its value is inherited.  This name is reserved
       by virtue of its definition in the XML specification.
     
    
    
     Notes
     
      Attempting to install the relevant ISO 2- and 3-letter
      codes as the enumerated possible values is probably never
      going to be a realistic possibility.  
     
     
      See BCP 47 at 
       http://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/bcp/bcp47.txt
      and the IANA language subtag registry at
      
       http://www.iana.org/assignments/language-subtag-registry
      for further information.
     
     
      The union allows for the 'un-declaration' of xml:lang with
      the empty string.

ArrestAgency.definition: An agency which employs the arresting official.
